query.statment: create table DB_UPDATE ( LAST_UPD INTEGER not null );
alter table DB_UPDATE add primary key (LAST_UPD);

create or replace view issue_by_complaint_all_case as select i.id issue_id,i.issue_title,i.project_name,i.business_id,i.business_id_by_date ,cm.business_comp_id,cm.id as comp_id,cm.ticket_type,cm.current_owner,cm.current_owner_id,cm.current_owner_since,tp.type_name ,cu.sys_id as customer_id,cu.name as customer_name,u.user_id,u.user_name,u.full_name ,s.user_id as sender_id,s.full_name as sender_name ,dl.receive_date as entry_date,dl.acknowledge_date,dl.option1 comp_subject,dl.resp_context as resp,dl.receip_id ,dl.is_acknowledged,dl.any_comment as comments,dl.client_com_id,dl.option3, p.project_id department_id,p.project_name department_name,p.option_one option_one, ist.status_name status_code,ist.status_id,ist.action_taken action_taken,ist.total_time total_time,st.case_en status_en_name, st.case_ar status_ar_name ,ist.end_date from issue i,client_complaints cm,client cu,users u,distribution_list dl, project p,ticket_type tp, users s, issue_status ist, status_type st where i.id=cm.issue_id and i.urgency_id=cu.sys_id and dl.receip_id=u.user_id and dl.sender_id=s.user_id and p.option_one = dl.receip_id and cm.id=dl.client_com_id and ist.business_obj_id=dl.client_com_id and st.id = ist.status_name and ist.end_date is null and cm.ticket_type=tp.type_id
union all
select i.id issue_id,i.issue_title,i.project_name,i.business_id,i.business_id_by_date ,cm.business_comp_id,cm.id as comp_id,cm.ticket_type,cm.current_owner,cm.current_owner_id,cm.current_owner_since,tp.type_name ,cu.sys_id as customer_id,cu.name as customer_name,u.user_id,u.user_name,u.full_name ,s.user_id as sender_id,s.full_name as sender_name ,dl.receive_date as entry_date,dl.acknowledge_date,dl.option1 comp_subject,dl.resp_context as resp,dl.receip_id ,dl.is_acknowledged,dl.any_comment as comments,dl.client_com_id,dl.option3, p.project_id department_id,p.project_name department_name,p.option_one option_one, ist.status_name status_code,ist.status_id,ist.action_taken action_taken,ist.total_time total_time,st.case_en status_en_name, st.case_ar status_ar_name ,ist.end_date from issue i,client_complaints cm,client cu,users u,distribution_list dl, project p,ticket_type tp, users s, issue_status ist, status_type st where i.id=cm.issue_id and i.urgency_id=cu.sys_id and dl.receip_id=u.user_id and dl.sender_id=s.user_id and p.option_one = dl.receip_id and cm.id=dl.client_com_id and ist.business_obj_id=dl.client_com_id and st.id = ist.status_name and cm.ticket_type=tp.type_id and ist.end_date is not null and ist.total_time=0

create table CLIENT_SEASONS ( ID VARCHAR2(50) not null, CLIENT_ID VARCHAR2(50) not null, SEASON_ID VARCHAR2(50) not null, CREATED_BY VARCHAR2(50), CREATION_TIME DATE, NOTES VARCHAR2(100), SEASON_NAME VARCHAR2(50) )

create or replace view client_view as select c.sys_id client_id,c.client_no client_no,c.name client_name,c.gender gender, c.address address, c.phone phone, c.mobile mobile, c.email email, c.clientssn clientSsn, c.partner partner, c.job job, c.option1 option1, c.option2 option2, c.matiral_status matiralStatus, c.age_group age, cp.id client_project_id, cp.project_id project_id, cp.product_id product_id, cp.product_category_id product_category_id, cp.budget budget, cp.period period, cp.payment_system payment_system, cp.note cp_note, cp.product_name product_name, cp.product_category_name product_category_name, cs.id client_season_id, cs.season_id season_id, cs.notes season_notes, cs.season_name season_name from client c,client_projects cp,client_seasons cs where c.sys_id(+)=cp.client_id and c.sys_id=cs.client_id and cp.client_id=cs.client_id
create table EXT_DB_CONNECTION ( ID VARCHAR2(50), HOST_NAME VARCHAR2(200), SERVICE_NAME VARCHAR2(100), USER_NAME VARCHAR2(100), PASSWORD VARCHAR2(100), TYPE VARCHAR2(50) )
alter table CLIENT modify ADDRESS VARCHAR2(200)
alter table CLIENT add birth_date date

CREATE TABLE ALERT ( ID VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL, BUSINESS_OBJ_ID VARCHAR2(20) NOT NULL, ALERT_TYPE_ID VARCHAR2(1) NOT NULL, CREATED_BY VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL, CRAETION_DATE TIMESTAMP(6) NOT NULL, OPTION1 VARCHAR2(50), OPTION2 VARCHAR2(50), OPTION3 VARCHAR2(50) )
ALTER TABLE ALERT ADD CONSTRAINT ALERT_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)

CREATE TABLE CHANNELS ( ID VARCHAR2(50), NAME VARCHAR2(200), OWNER_ID VARCHAR2(50), CRAETION_TIME TIMESTAMP (6), OPTION1 VARCHAR2(50), OPTION2 VARCHAR2(50), OPTION3 VARCHAR2(50) )
ALTER TABLE CHANNELS ADD CONSTRAINT CHANNELS_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)
ALTER TABLE CHANNELS ADD CONSTRAINT CHANNELS_FK1 FOREIGN KEY (OWNER_ID) REFERENCES USERS (USER_ID) ON DELETE CASCADE ENABLE
CREATE TABLE CHANNELS_USERS ( CHANNELS_ID VARCHAR2(50), USERS_ID VARCHAR2(50), CREATED_BY VARCHAR2(50), CRAETION_TIME TIMESTAMP (6), OPTION1 VARCHAR2(50), OPTION2 VARCHAR2(50), OPTION3 VARCHAR2(50) )
ALTER TABLE CHANNELS_USERS ADD CONSTRAINT CHANNELS_USERS_PK PRIMARY KEY (CHANNELS_ID, USERS_ID)

ALTER TABLE CHANNELS_USERS ADD CONSTRAINT CHANNELS_USERS_FK1 FOREIGN KEY (CHANNELS_ID) REFERENCES CHANNELS (ID) ON DELETE CASCADE ENABLE; ALTER TABLE CHANNELS_USERS ADD CONSTRAINT CHANNELS_USERS_FK2 FOREIGN KEY (USERS_ID) REFERENCES USERS (USERS_ID) ON DELETE CASCADE ENABLE;

CREATE TABLE "WITHDARW_CLNT_HISTORY" ( "WTH_CLNT_ID" VARCHAR2(20 BYTE), "CREATED_BY" VARCHAR2(20 BYTE), "CREATION_TIME" TIMESTAMP (6), "SENDER_ID" VARCHAR2(20 BYTE), "RECIP_ID" VARCHAR2(20 BYTE), "RECEIVE_DATE" TIMESTAMP (6), "CLIENT_ID" VARCHAR2(20 BYTE), "DISTRIBUTION_TYPE" VARCHAR2(50 BYTE), "ISSUE_ID" VARCHAR2(20 BYTE), "CURRENT_STATUS" VARCHAR2(20 BYTE), "OPTIOIN1" VARCHAR2(20 BYTE), "OPTIOIN2" VARCHAR2(20 BYTE), "OPTION3" VARCHAR2(20 BYTE) )

create or replace TRIGGER "WITHDRAW_CLNT_HISTORY_TRGR" before DELETE ON DISTRIBUTION_LIST BEGIN if deleting then INSERT INTO WITHDARW_CLNT_HISTORY (WTH_CLNT_ID, CREATED_BY, CREATION_TIME, SENDER_ID, RECIP_ID, RECEIVE_DATE, DISTRIBUTION_TYPE, ISSUE_ID,CLIENT_ID, CURRENT_STATUS, OPTIOIN1, OPTIOIN2, OPTION3) SELECT W.DRAWER_ID, W.DRAWER_ID, SYSDATE, DL.SENDER_ID, DL.RECEIP_ID, DL.RECEIVE_DATE, DL.OPTION1, CC.ISSUE_ID, I.URGENCY_ID, I.CURRENT_STATUS, 'UL', 'UL', 'UL' FROM DISTRIBUTION_LIST DL LEFT JOIN CLIENT_COMPLAINTS CC ON DL.CLIENT_COM_ID = CC.ID LEFT JOIN ISSUE I ON CC.ISSUE_ID = I.ID LEFT JOIN WITHDRAW W ON I.URGENCY_ID = W.CLIENT_ID WHERE W.WIHDRAW_TIME = (SELECT MAX(WIHDRAW_TIME) FROM WITHDRAW ); end if; END;

CREATE TABLE MESSAGES ( ID VARCHAR2(20 BYTE) NOT NULL, MESSAGE VARCHAR2(500 BYTE) NOT NULL, ON_DATE TIMESTAMP NOT NULL, FREQUENCY VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL, STATUS VARCHAR2(3) NOT NULL, PERIOD INT NOT NULL, OPTION1 VARCHAR2(50), OPTION2 VARCHAR2(50), OPTION3 VARCHAR2(50), OPTION4 VARCHAR2(50), OPTION5 VARCHAR2(50), OPTION6 VARCHAR2(50), CONSTRAINT MESSAGES_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID) ENABLE )
ALTER TABLE MESSAGES ADD CONSTRAINT MESSAGES_CHK CHECK (FREQUENCY IN ('once', 'daily', 'monthly')) ENABLE
ALTER TABLE APPOINTMENT ADD CONSTRAINT APPOINTMENT_UK1 UNIQUE (OPTION2, NOTE, USER_ID, CURRENT_STATUS, CREATION_TIME, "COMMENT", OPTION9) ENABLE
UPDATE CLIENT_COMPLAINTS_TYPE SET TYPE_TAG = 'أعادة توجيه' WHERE TYPE_TAG LIKE 'اعادة توجيه من %'; UPDATE DISTRIBUTION_LIST SET OPTION1 = 'أعادة توجيه' WHERE OPTION1 LIKE 'اعادة توجيه من %';

CREATE TABLE USERS_EXT ( USER_ID VARCHAR2(50 BYTE) NOT NULL ENABLE, COMMERCIAL_RECORD VARCHAR2(50 BYTE) NOT NULL ENABLE, TAX_CARD_NUMBER VARCHAR2(50 BYTE) NOT NULL ENABLE, AUTHORIZED_PERSON VARCHAR2(200 BYTE) NOT NULL ENABLE, COMPANY_ADDRESS VARCHAR2(200 BYTE) NOT NULL ENABLE, RECORD_DATE DATE, CREATION_TIME TIMESTAMP (6) NOT NULL ENABLE, CREATED_BY VARCHAR2(25 BYTE), OPTION1 VARCHAR2(100 BYTE), OPTION2 VARCHAR2(100 BYTE), OPTION3 VARCHAR2(100 BYTE), OPTION4 VARCHAR2(100 BYTE), OPTION5 VARCHAR2(100 BYTE), OPTION6 VARCHAR2(100 BYTE), CONSTRAINT USERS_EXT_PK PRIMARY KEY (USER_ID) )

CREATE TABLE INVOICE ( ID VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL, BUSINESS_ID VARCHAR2(25) NOT NULL, INVOICE_NO VARCHAR2(25) NOT NULL, INVOICE_DATE DATE NOT NULL, EXTRACT_NO VARCHAR2(25) NOT NULL, CREATED_BY VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL, CREATION_TIME DATE NOT NULL, CURRENT_STATUS VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL, CURRENT_STATUS_SINCE TIMESTAMP NOT NULL, OPTION1 VARCHAR2(100), OPTION2 VARCHAR2(100), OPTION3 VARCHAR2(100), OPTION4 VARCHAR2(100), OPTION5 VARCHAR2(100), OPTION6 VARCHAR2(100), CONSTRAINT INVOICE_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)ENABLE ); ALTER TABLE INVOICE ADD CONSTRAINT INVOICE_FK1 FOREIGN KEY (ID) REFERENCES CLIENT_COMPLAINTS (ID) ENABLE;

CREATE TABLE CLIENT_INVOICE ( ID VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL, BUSINESS_ID VARCHAR2(25) NOT NULL, INVOICE_NO VARCHAR2(25) NOT NULL, INVOICE_DATE DATE NOT NULL, EXTRACT_NO VARCHAR2(25) NOT NULL, CREATED_BY VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL, CREATION_TIME DATE NOT NULL, CURRENT_STATUS VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL, CURRENT_STATUS_SINCE TIMESTAMP NOT NULL, OPTION1 VARCHAR2(100), OPTION2 VARCHAR2(100), OPTION3 VARCHAR2(100), OPTION4 VARCHAR2(100), OPTION5 VARCHAR2(100), OPTION6 VARCHAR2(100), CONSTRAINT CLIENT_INVOICE_PK PRIMARY KEY (ID)ENABLE ); ALTER TABLE CLIENT_INVOICE ADD CONSTRAINT CLIENT_INVOICE_FK FOREIGN KEY (ID) REFERENCES CLIENT_COMPLAINTS (ID) ENABLE;
ALTER TABLE CLIENT_INVOICE DROP CONSTRAINT CLIENT_INVOICE_FK
ALTER TABLE CLIENT_INVOICE ADD CONSTRAINT CLIENT_INVOICE_NO_UK UNIQUE (INVOICE_NO) ENABLE

CREATE TABLE FINANCIAL_DOCUMENT ( FD_ID VARCHAR2(20) NOT NULL , FD_TITLE VARCHAR2(250) , FD_SERIAL VARCHAR2(250) , FD_TYPE VARCHAR2(20) , FD_VALUE NUMBER , FD_SOURCE VARCHAR2(250) , FD_DESTINATION VARCHAR2(250) , FD_DATE DATE , CREATION_TIME TIMESTAMP , CREATED_BY VARCHAR(50) , NOTES VARCHAR2(500) , OPTION_1 VARCHAR2(20) , OPTION_2 VARCHAR2(20) , OPTION_3 VARCHAR2(20) , OPTION_4 VARCHAR2(20) , CONSTRAINT FINANCIALDOCUMENT_PK PRIMARY KEY ( FD_ID ) ENABLE )

CREATE OR REPLACE FORCE VIEW DESTINATION_VIEW ("ID", "NAME", "OBJECT_TYPE") AS SELECT SYS_ID ID, NAME, CASE WHEN AGE_GROUP = '30-40' THEN 'client' WHEN AGE_GROUP IN ('100', '200', '300', '500') THEN 'contractor' END OBJECT_TYPE FROM CLIENT UNION SELECT EMP_ID ID, EMP_NAME NAME, 'employee' OBJECT_TYPE FROM EMPLOYEE UNION SELECT PROJECT_ID ID, PROJECT_NAME NAME, 'safe' OBJECT_TYPE FROM PROJECT WHERE LOCATION_TYPE = 'FIN_SAFE' UNION SELECT PROJECT_ID ID, PROJECT_NAME NAME, 'bank' OBJECT_TYPE FROM PROJECT WHERE LOCATION_TYPE = 'FIN_BNK'
